payload.answer: The timing is ambiguous because “last Friday” and “next month” depend on the date this was said or recorded. Please clarify before saving.
repair_options: Save only the uncertain note as written: “Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.”
Clarify the actual date meant by “last Friday,” then save the statement with that date.
Clarify the actual month meant by “next month,” then save that Sam is leaving Goldman in that month.
Clarify both the date Sam said it and the departure month, then save the precise fact.
